description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy, utilitarian design and a matte black finish. The receiver is rectangular with visible wear and scratches, suggesting frequent use or age. A prominent detachable box magazine extends vertically from the grip, and a simple wire folding stock is attached to the rear, looping over the top. The barrel is short and stubby, protruding only slightly from the front of the receiver, and the iron sights are fixed and basic. The trigger guard is large and the grip is straight, with minimal ergonomic shaping. The overall appearance is rugged and functional, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a wire folding stock, short barrel, and detachable box magazine. The finish is worn and utilitarian, emphasizing function over aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, front sight, and the narrow profile of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wire folding stock, magazine, trigger, and visible wear on the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the alignment of the stock and magazine.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, wire stock, and the overall boxy shape of the rifle.
